messages.content: # Is the driver's head not moving even with NeckFX on? Follow this guide!

## Method 1

> Open Content Manager and go to Settings > Custom Shaders Patch > NeckFX
> Untick the active box

## Method 2
> Go to Settings > Custom Shaders Patch > NeckFX
> Untick Active for “Replace Original CSP implementation with a custom script”

## Method 3
> If your neck fx still is not working, make sure your render mode in Content Manager > Settings > Assetto Corsa > Video > Rendering Mode > Set to Single Screen
